{{Infobox group
| name = Naru clan
| introduced = Blackflame
}}

''See also: [[Naru clan Timeline]]''

== Overview ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|The [[Naru]] clan is the ruling family of the [[Blackflame Empire]], having ascended to power approximately fifty years ago following the decline of the original [[Blackflame]] lineage. Known for their reputation of loyalty, they serve as the public face of the [[Empire]]. Members of the clan are physically distinguished by their [[emerald]]-colored wings, which are associated with their specific [[Path]] known as the [[Path of Grasping Sky]]. These wings serve as a mark of their status, and imperial etiquette dictates specific protocols for how they move through doorways and interact with others based on rank. The clan is structured under a hierarchy of leadership, including [[the Emperor]]—who also serves as the Patriarch—and various Underlords. The current ruler is [[Emperor Naru Huan]], who succeeded his mother. The clan functions as a vassal faction under the [[Akura clan]] and maintains various roles within the [[Empire]], including acting as adjudicators and overseeing military defenses. In their training traditions, the [[Naru]] focus on developing disciples in teams rather than individuals, sometimes utilizing the [[Blackflame Trials]] for this purpose.}}

== Blackflame ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|As an imperial clan, the [[Naru]] serve as the traditional servants of the [[Blackflame family]] and act as the public face of the [[Blackflame Empire]]. Recognized for their loyalty, members of this group are distinguished by their shining [[emerald]] wings. While the clan is noted in the accounts of [[Cassias]], they maintain strict control over their traditions by only permitting a small number of disciples to undergo the [[Blackflame Trials]] each year.}}

<div class="wv-facts mw-collapsible mw-collapsed"><div class="wv-facts-head mw-collapsible-toggle">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">5</span></div>
<ul class="wv-fact-list mw-collapsible-content">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|The [[Naru clan]] are the traditional servants of the [[Blackflame family]] and became the face of the [[Blackflame Empire]].<ref name="cradle-03-blackflame-c1">''Blackflame'', chapter 1</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|The [[Naru clan]] has shining [[emerald]] wings and a loyal reputation.<ref name="cradle-03-blackflame-c1" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|The [[Naru clan]] is a group mentioned by [[Cassias]].<ref name="cradle-03-blackflame-c11">''Blackflame'', chapter 11</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|The [[Naru clan]] only permits a handful of disciples to use the [[Blackflame Trials]] each year.<ref name="cradle-03-blackflame-c16">''Blackflame'', chapter 16</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|The [[Naru]] is an imperial clan.<ref name="cradle-03-blackflame-c17">''Blackflame'', chapter 17</ref>}}</li>
</ul></div>

== Skysworn ==
<div class="wv-facts mw-collapsible mw-collapsed"><div class="wv-facts-head mw-collapsible-toggle">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">1</span></div>
<ul class="wv-fact-list mw-collapsible-content">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|The [[Naru clan]] follows the [[Path of Grasping Sky]].<ref name="cradle-04-skysworn-c14">''Skysworn'', chapter 14</ref>}}</li>
</ul></div>

== Ghostwater ==
<div class="wv-facts mw-collapsible mw-collapsed"><div class="wv-facts-head mw-collapsible-toggle">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">1</span></div>
<ul class="wv-fact-list mw-collapsible-content">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|[[Naru Huan]] is the Patriarch of the [[Naru clan]].<ref name="cradle-05-ghostwater-c19">''Ghostwater'', chapter 19</ref>}}</li>
</ul></div>

== Underlord ==
<div class="wv-facts mw-collapsible mw-collapsed"><div class="wv-facts-head mw-collapsible-toggle">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">1</span></div>
<ul class="wv-fact-list mw-collapsible-content">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|The [[Naru clan]] has a headquarters on a hilltop near a shadowy portal.<ref name="cradle-06-underlord-c11">''Underlord'', chapter 11</ref>}}</li>
</ul></div>

== Uncrowned ==
<div class="wv-facts mw-collapsible mw-collapsed"><div class="wv-facts-head mw-collapsible-toggle">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">1</span></div>
<ul class="wv-fact-list mw-collapsible-content">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|The [[Naru clan]] is a group.<ref name="cradle-07-uncrowned-c9">''Uncrowned'', chapter 9</ref>}}</li>
</ul></div>

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Groups]]
[[Category:Blackflame]]
[[Category:Skysworn]]
[[Category:Ghostwater]]
[[Category:Underlord]]
[[Category:Uncrowned]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle groups]]
